---
title: "Gujarat Riots Analysis"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(readr)
```

```{r language}
language <- read_excel("language_mother_tounge_city.xls") %>%
  select(-...9, -...10, -...12, -...13, -...15, -...16)
language <- language[-1, ]
colnames(language) <- language[1, ]
language <- language[-1, ] %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  filter(grepl("000$", MOTHER)) %>%
  group_by(TOWN) %>%
  mutate(TOWN    = as.numeric(TOWN),
         TOTAL   = as.numeric(TOTAL),
         PERCENT = round(TOTAL / sum(TOTAL) * 100, 5))
```

```{r towns}
towns <- read_excel("town_directory.xls") %>%
  select(DIST_CODE, THSIL_CODE, TOWN_CODE, TOWN_NAME, CLASS, C_STATUS, AREA, POP_2001, DENSITY) %>%
  rename(TOWN = TOWN_CODE) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(TOWN     = as.numeric(TOWN),
         AREA     = as.numeric(AREA),
         POP_2001 = as.numeric(POP_2001),
         DENSITY  = as.numeric(DENSITY))
```

```{r religion}
raw <- read_excel("religion_town.xls", col_names = FALSE, skip = 4)

colnames(raw) <- c(
  "table_name", "state_code", "dist_code", "tehsil_code", "town_code", "area_name",
  "total_rural_urban",
  "total_persons", "total_males", "total_females",
  "hindu_persons", "hindu_males", "hindu_females",
  "muslim_persons", "muslim_males", "muslim_females",
  "christian_persons", "christian_males", "christian_females",
  "sikh_persons", "sikh_males", "sikh_females",
  "buddhist_persons", "buddhist_males", "buddhist_females",
  "jain_persons", "jain_males", "jain_females",
  "other_religion_persons", "other_religion_males", "other_religion_females",
  "religion_not_stated_persons", "religion_not_stated_males", "religion_not_stated_females"
)

religion_clean <- raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(area_name), area_name != "") %>%
  filter(!total_persons %in% c("1", "Persons")) %>%
  mutate(across(c(dist_code, state_code, tehsil_code, town_code), as.numeric)) %>%
  filter(dist_code != 0 & town_code != 0) %>%
  mutate(across(total_persons:religion_not_stated_females, as.numeric))

religion_district <- raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(area_name), area_name != "") %>%
  filter(!total_persons %in% c("1", "Persons")) %>%
  mutate(across(c(dist_code, state_code, tehsil_code, town_code), as.numeric)) %>%
  filter(dist_code %in% c(5, 23, 26) & town_code == 0 & tehsil_code == 0) %>%
  mutate(across(total_persons:religion_not_stated_females, as.numeric))
```

```{r riots}
riots <- read.csv("communal_riots_table.csv") %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace_na(., 0))) %>%
  mutate(dist_code = case_when(
    District %in% c("A'bad City",    "A'bad Rural")                        ~ 7,
    District %in% c("Vadodara City", "Vadodara Rural", "Westpol Vadodara") ~ 19,
    District %in% c("Surat City",    "Surat Rural")                        ~ 18,
    District %in% c("Rajkot City",   "Rajkot Rural")                       ~ 22,
    District == "Anand"         ~ 2,
    District == "Godhra"        ~ 16,
    District == "Sabarkantha"   ~ 23,
    District == "Kheda"         ~ 10,
    District == "Mehsana"       ~ 13,
    District == "Banaskantha"   ~ 4,
    District == "Bharuch"       ~ 5,
    District == "Gandhinagar"   ~ 6,
    District == "Amreli"        ~ 1,
    District == "Junagadh"      ~ 9,
    District == "Dahod"         ~ 8,
    District == "Narmada"       ~ 14,
    District == "Patan"         ~ 17,
    District == "Ahwa-Dang"     ~ 26,
    District == "Jamnagar"      ~ 11,
    District == "Navsari"       ~ 15,
    District == "Porbandar"     ~ 20,
    District == "Valsad"        ~ 25,
    District == "Surendranagar" ~ 24,
    District == "Bhavnagar"     ~ 3,
    District == "Kutch-Bhuj"    ~ 12,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>%
  mutate(District = case_when(
    dist_code == 7  ~ "Ahmedabad",
    dist_code == 19 ~ "Vadodara",
    dist_code == 18 ~ "Surat",
    dist_code == 22 ~ "Rajkot",
    TRUE ~ District
  )) %>%
  filter(Sr_No != "Total") %>%
  group_by(dist_code, District) %>%
  summarise(
    Dargah       = sum(Dargah,       na.rm = TRUE),
    Masjid       = sum(Masjid,       na.rm = TRUE),
    Madresa      = sum(Madresa,      na.rm = TRUE),
    Temple       = sum(Temple,       na.rm = TRUE),
    Church       = sum(Church,       na.rm = TRUE),
    Total        = sum(Total,        na.rm = TRUE),
    Repaired     = sum(Repaired,     na.rm = TRUE),
    Not_Repaired = sum(Not_Repaired, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r combine}
combined <- religion_clean %>%
  inner_join(language, by = c("town_code" = "TOWN")) %>%
  inner_join(towns,   by = c("town_code" = "TOWN"))

clean_combine <- combined %>%
  select(table_name, area_name, town_code, state_code, dist_code,
         total_persons, hindu_persons, muslim_persons, christian_persons,
         sikh_persons, jain_persons, buddhist_persons, other_religion_persons,
         `MOTHER TONGUE`, PERCENT, AREA, DENSITY) %>%
  group_by(town_code) %>%
  mutate(pop_per_person = total_persons / AREA,
         total_persons  = as.numeric(total_persons),
         hindu_persons  = as.numeric(hindu_persons),
         muslim_persons = as.numeric(muslim_persons)) %>%
  drop_na()

missing_districts <- religion_district %>%
  select(table_name, area_name, town_code, state_code, dist_code,
         total_persons, hindu_persons, muslim_persons, christian_persons,
         sikh_persons, jain_persons, buddhist_persons, other_religion_persons) %>%
  mutate(
    `MOTHER TONGUE` = "5 GUJARATI",
    PERCENT         = NA_real_,
    AREA            = NA_real_,
    DENSITY         = NA_real_,
    pop_per_person  = NA_real_,
    total_persons   = as.numeric(total_persons),
    hindu_persons   = as.numeric(hindu_persons),
    muslim_persons  = as.numeric(muslim_persons)
  )

clean_combine <- bind_rows(clean_combine, missing_districts)
```

```{r housing}
housing <- read.csv("gujarat_housing_composition.csv", header = FALSE, check.names = FALSE) %>%
  slice(6:n()) %>%
  select(1:13) %>%
  rename(
    table_name        = V1,
    state_code        = V2,
    dist_code         = V3,
    tehsil_city_code  = V4,
    area_name         = V5,
    total_rural_urban = V6,
    total_total       = V7,
    total_good        = V8,
    total_livable     = V9,
    total_dilapidated = V10,
    residence_total   = V11,
    residence_good    = V12,
    residence_livable = V13
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(c(total_total, total_good, total_livable, total_dilapidated,
                  residence_total, residence_good, residence_livable),
                ~as.numeric(gsub(",", "", .)))) %>%
  mutate(state_code       = as.numeric(state_code),
         dist_code        = as.numeric(dist_code),
         tehsil_city_code = as.numeric(tehsil_city_code)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(dist_code), dist_code != 0) %>%
  filter(trimws(total_rural_urban) == "Total") %>%
  filter(grepl("District", area_name) & !grepl("City", area_name)) %>%
  select(dist_code, total_total, total_good, total_livable, total_dilapidated,
         residence_total, residence_good, residence_livable) %>%
  mutate(pct_dilapidated = total_dilapidated / total_total * 100)
```

```{r final}
final <- clean_combine %>%
  left_join(riots, by = "dist_code") %>%
  mutate(total_muslim_destroyed = Dargah + Masjid + Madresa)
```

```{r summary}
summary_df <- final %>%
  filter(`MOTHER TONGUE` == "5 GUJARATI") %>%
  group_by(dist_code, District) %>%
  summarize(
    pct_gujarati           = mean(PERCENT,                na.rm = TRUE),
    total_muslim_destroyed = mean(total_muslim_destroyed, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_hindu_minus_muslim = mean((hindu_persons - muslim_persons) /
                                    total_persons * 100,  na.rm = TRUE),
    total_persons          = sum(total_persons,           na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r manual-districts}
summary_df <- summary_df %>%
  mutate(
    District = case_when(
      dist_code == 5  ~ "Bharuch",
      dist_code == 23 ~ "Sabarkantha",
      dist_code == 26 ~ "Ahwa-Dang",
      TRUE ~ District
    ),
    total_muslim_destroyed = case_when(
      dist_code == 5  ~ 7,
      dist_code == 23 ~ 0,
      dist_code == 26 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ total_muslim_destroyed
    ),
    pct_gujarati = case_when(
      dist_code == 5  ~ 84.97,
      dist_code == 23 ~ 97.85,
      TRUE ~ pct_gujarati
    ),
    total_persons = case_when(
      dist_code == 5  ~ 1370104,
      dist_code == 23 ~ 2083416,
      dist_code == 26 ~ 186712,
      TRUE ~ total_persons
    )
  )
```

```{r final-before-capita}
new_final <- summary_df %>%
  left_join(housing, by = "dist_code")
```

```{r per-capita}
new_final <- new_final %>%
  mutate(
    muslim_destroyed_per_capita    = total_muslim_destroyed / total_persons,
    good_housing_per_capita        = total_good             / total_persons,
    livable_housing_per_capita     = total_livable          / total_persons,
    dilapidated_housing_per_capita = total_dilapidated      / total_persons,
    pct_dilapidated                = total_dilapidated      / total_total   * 100
  )
```

```{r regression}
regression <- lm(I(muslim_destroyed_per_capita * 100000) ~ 1 + pct_gujarati +
                   I(pct_hindu_minus_muslim ^ 2) + good_housing_per_capita,
                 data = new_final)
summary(regression)
plot(regression, which = 1:2)
```

```{r remove-district-2}
new_final_no2 <- new_final %>%
  filter(dist_code != 2)

regression_no2 <- lm(I(muslim_destroyed_per_capita * 100000) ~ 1 + pct_gujarati +
                   I(pct_hindu_minus_muslim ^ 2) + good_housing_per_capita,
                 data = new_final_no2)
summary(regression_no2)
plot(regression_no2, which = 1:2)
```
